description:
Name: Rita

Proficiency: Surprises

Birth: FCU

Age: Classified

Affiliation(s): Frauleins
title: Fraulein der Krieg
unit_description: A Fraulein who works at the R&D division. She is Miss Conway's favorite assistant due to how compentent she is at simplifying Conway's projects into something logistically feasible to be fielded. By herself though, Rita is quite a quirky prankster who seems to be fond of throwing surprises to people. Literally.
